meaning: adj.得到灵感的,有灵感的,权威人士(或官方)授意的
examples: He called Mr. Mandela a hero who had inspired millions.
It inspired me to be more inventive with my own cooking.
She has inspired a whole generation of fashion school graduates.
Ca'd'Oro, known as Alla Vedova, is the osteria that most inspired my London restaurant Polpo.
The dramatic sight has inspired legends of giants striding over the sea to Scotland.
